title: tragacantha lagurus
intro: Tragacantha lagurus, also known as Gorse or Furze, is a thorny, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region and Western Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha lagurus include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Tragacantha lagurus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
